name: _DoIP_EntityStatusResponse
title: _DoIP_EntityStatusResponse
syntax: void _DoIP_EntityStatusResponse( char IPaddress[], WORD port, BYTE nodeType, BYTE maxConcurrentTCPsockets, BYTE currentlyOpenTCPsockets, DWORD maxDataSize);
description: A response for an entity status request was received.

parameters.name: IPaddress
parameters.description: Address in text form, e.g. “169.254.32.1” (IPv4) or “2001::1” (IPv6).

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: IP source port of the packet at the sender.

parameters.name: nodeType
parameters.description: Type of the node. Currently 0 for gateway and 1 for node are defined.

parameters.name: maxConcurrentTCPsockets
parameters.description: Maximum number of TCP connections the entity can handle simultaneously.

parameters.name: currentlyOpenTCPsockets
parameters.description: Number of TCP sockets currently open and in use.

parameters.name: maxDataSize
parameters.description: Maximum size of a diagnostics request this entity can process. Note: A value of 0 indicates that the response did not carry this optional parameter.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
